title: Wide Display of Polka Dot and Crochet Hair Accessories on Wooden Surface
description: A wide shot of a collection of hair accessories arranged neatly on a wooden surface against a neutral textured background. The assortment includes polka dot patterned bows and scrunchies, crochet headbands and clips with floral designs, tortoiseshell and pearl hair clips, and a velvet scrunchie with a floral pattern. The image features even lighting and high resolution to highlight the textures and details of the accessories.
